/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/src/acc.cc.o CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/src/acc_invest.cc.o CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/src/enablebanking_client.cc.o CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/src/app_server.cc.o CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/src/json_mapper.cc.o CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/src/webhook_server.cc.o CMakeFiles/BanksConnectApp.dir/src/database.cc.o -o BanksConnectApp  -lsqlite3
